memoryArtifacts.headline:
Richard Scott
(1475 – April 1560)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Richard Scott was born about 1475, probably in Glemsford, Suffolk. 

His father William, who must have been very well to do, left him land in Glemsford, Boxted and Cavendish. 

Richard decided to sett …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Scott於大約1476年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親William Scott28歲，母親Clemence23歲。他於1500年與Agnes在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1560年4月在英國英格蘭素福爾可波泰德享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Scott was born about 1476, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Scott, was 28 and his mother, Clemence, was 23. He married Agnes in 1500, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about April 1560, in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Agnes en 1500, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ avril 1560, à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Boxted, Babergh D: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Scott(이)가 대략 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Scott(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Clemence(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 수폴크에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1560년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스테드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes em 1500, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.All Saints Churchyard, Boxted, Babergh D: алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Scott родился около 1476 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Scott было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1500 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около апрель 1560 г. в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
